productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Light blue denim trousers with a stone-washed look, has two side pockets and a patch pocket above the right one, two large back pockets, comfortable waist with loops, zippered and buttoned closure and reinforced stitch detailing on the crotch area Fitting Slim boot Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Take edgy dressing to the next level in these slim boot jeans from united colors of benetton. Perfect for casual outings with friends, this denim trouser looks great with grunge tees and leather vests with leather boots. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 42" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
